gigapan.name: Corner of Depot and Brown Streets, Sebastopol, Northeast Plan area (20080608-01)
gigapan.description:
Depot Street starts at Screaming Mimi's and dead ends three blocks later in the building with the Guayaki Bar.  On the left the new development at 100 Brown, then looking West on Bodega Highway.  The American flag marks the city building and Library.  
Screaming Mimi's is in pink, then the lumber yard which has been abandoned for a decade or more. A peak
at the movie theatre, in a former brandy factory, then the two empty lots at 6826 Depot, then Imperial Door and Millwork at 6794 Depot, a glimpse of the Art's Center, then the Green and Orange of Guayaki, ending on the right with the grey of the NAPA Auto Parts building.

Depot street is straight from screaming mimi's, the pink bldg on the left, to the guayki building, the orange and green building to the right - the U-shaped effect is distortion from the extreme field of view (over 180 degrees).


162 images (approx) 12.8 minutes exposure time.  Focal Length 149 mm
